scripts.build: npm run build -w @memmy/frontend-desktop && npm run build:main && node -e "require('node:fs').cpSync('../../frontend/desktop/dist', 'dist/renderer', { recursive: true })"
scripts.build:main: npm run build -w @memmy/desktop-interface && npm run build -w @memmy/backend && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:runtime: npm --prefix ../../.. run memory:build && npm --prefix ../../memmy-agent run build
scripts.dev: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:main && electron dist/main/main.js
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @memmy/desktop-interface && npm run build -w @memmy/backend && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
